title: TaskCompletionEvent
description: Append-only, idempotent record that a money-aware task was completed (FR-TASK-002, FR-X-007). Provided by Module 7 to Habits (advances streaks/XP for REAL financial actions), Inbox, and the originating module. This is the source-of-truth signal that 'a real financial action happened'. Keyed on source_event_id with a UNIQUE constraint: a replayed event applies the linked-entity status write-back and emits this event AT MOST ONCE (US2 AS-2, platform-decisions §4). Carries NO money figure and moves NO money (FR-X-003); consumers receive only the completion signal + the link reference, never raw linked amounts (threat model: data minimization).

event_id.description: Stable id of this completion event in the append-only store.

source_event_id.description: Client-generated idempotency key for the completion. UNIQUE: a replay with the same source_event_id is a no-op for both the status write-back and this event (idempotency — Constitution IV, FR-X-003).

profile_id.description: Owning profile. A cross-profile completion is authorized server-side against the session identity + the link owner's scope; a denied attempt is audited, not emitted as a completion (threat model: forged write-back).

completed_at.description: UTC instant the task was completed. Stored in UTC; rendered to the user's locale at the edge.

link_ref.description: Reference to the linked entity whose status this completion updated. Null for an unlinked (plain) task completion. Reference only — NEVER a money value.

source_contract.description: Owning contract $id + version the status write-back targeted.

writeback_outcome.description: synced = owning module confirmed the status update; pending_sync = write-back failed/timed out, retrying with backoff (FR-X-012); no_op_orphaned = linked entity was deleted (no write-back); no_op_unlinked = plain task with no link.

moved_money.description: ALWAYS false. Tasks records completion and propagates STATUS only; it never moves money (FR-X-003). Any money action routes through the owning module's Confirm-Action sheet.

reasoning.description: Optional explainability envelope (what status changed and why); inputs are redacted from debug logs and recorded in full only in the append-only audit trail (FR-X-014).
